<html><head><style>
.card { backdrop-filter: blur(...) + low-alpha background }
reason: Blurs and glass cards used decoratively rather than purposefully.
rewriteOptions: Reserve glass for one purposeful moment per page

matchedText: Three+ stat/metric/kpi blocks in sequence - SaaS hero-metric template shape
reason: Big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient accent. SaaS cliché.
rewriteOptions: Replace with a chart, illustration, or single anchor metric
Customer logos with specific named outcomes

matchedText: <dialog>/modal containing <form> - consider inline editing or progressive disclosure first
reason: Modals used where inline or progressive disclosure would work.
